title: Solana Staking - Open App
meta_description: solana staking for SOL holders: open official Solana guidance, choose a wallet, review validators, and delegate without fixed-yield claims.
hero_h2: Put SOL to work through wallet-based delegation
hero_lead: solana staking connects SOL holders to wallet-supported delegation, validator review, activation timing, and official Solana resources without fixed-yield claims.
what_is: Solana staking is the network's native SOL delegation flow: holders assign stake to validators while retaining control of their tokens. The official Solana staking FAQ explains validator selection, rewards, activation, and withdrawal timing.

how.d: Start from solana.com and use a wallet that supports stake operations.
Move the SOL you want to delegate into a stake account, keeping some SOL liquid for network fees.
Review commission, identity, uptime, and concentration; the Solana Foundation does not recommend a particular validator.
Submit the delegation in your wallet, then track activating, active, deactivating, or inactive status.

points.p: Delegation gives a validator voting weight, not ownership or control of your SOL.
Yield depends on network inflation, total active stake, validator uptime, and commission, so avoid pages promising a fixed return.
Once you have a stake account address, use Solana Explorer to review activation, delegation, and authority details.

faq.a: You delegate SOL from a stake account to a validator that participates in consensus; delegation does not transfer ownership of the tokens.
No. Native delegation gives the validator voting weight, while the wallet and stake authorities remain the control path for the holder.

faq.q: When does a stake account become active?
faq.a: Activation and deactivation happen around epoch boundaries. Solana describes an epoch as approximately 2 days, though network-wide limits can extend timing.

faq.q: How are rewards and commission handled?
faq.a: Rewards are issued to delegated stake accounts, and validator commission is taken as a percentage of earned rewards; outcomes vary by validator and network conditions.

faq.q: Where can I verify stake status?
faq.a: Use your wallet or paste the stake account address into Solana Explorer to inspect activation, delegation, and authority details.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify solana.com before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
